member.office_address: 243 Cannon House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0520

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Indicates required field. Please note that supporting documentation may be added on page 2 of this form. CAPTCHA: enabled to secure this form.

fields.label: Enter keywords to search content.
fields.rationale: This identifies the specific program account for the request.

sections.description: Select the fiscal year for which the request is being made.

fields.label: This is a request for fiscal year:: Year
fields.help_text: Identify the fiscal year for the appropriation request.
fields.rationale: The funding history and provided context indicate this is a request for the upcoming FY2027 cycle.

sections.description: Information about the individual submitting the request.

fields.label: State
options: Armed Forces (Canada, Europe, Africa, or Middle East)

fields.label: Phone Type:
fields.help_text: Constituents who are hard of hearing or use a video phone have the option to choose TDD or VP.

sections.description: Details regarding the specific subcommittee and type of funding or language request.

fields.label: Choose a Subcommittee:
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA appropriations are handled by the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee.

fields.label: Request Type:
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific programmatic funding level ($9 billion) for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Program or Language Title: (for Defense requests, include PE number)
fields.draft_value: * NASA Science Mission Directorate (SMD) Programmatic Funding Request
fields.rationale: Uses the standard programmatic title and account name provided in the reference values.

sections.description: Information about the organization associated with the request.

fields.label: State
options: Armed Forces (Canada, Europe, Africa, or Middle East)

sections.description: Narrative fields describing the project benefits, problems, and partnerships.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe why this is a good use of taxpayer funds and how it benefits the district.
fields.draft_value:
* Direct economic impact of $133,562,995 in NASA Science obligations within CA-20 between FY2023 and FY2025
* Supports specialized aerospace workforce through contracts with local firms such as Tbp&jj Worldwide Services LLC in Edwards for research facility operations
* Sustains regional industrial capacity via major awards to Vertex Aerospace LLC ($124.7M) and Inuteq, LLC ($85.8M)
* Leverages the 3-to-1 economic return on NASA investment to stimulate the local innovation economy and STEM talent pipeline
fields.rationale: Cites specific total obligations ($133.5M) and top contract recipients (Vertex, Inuteq, Tbp&jj) located in or serving the district/Edwards area as per the spending context.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe the problem or issue to be addressed through this request.
fields.draft_value:
* Erosion of U.S. strategic advantage in space science as China aggressively expands lunar and planetary mission capabilities
* Threat to workforce stability following recent agency-wide personnel reductions and contractor layoffs totaling thousands of positions
* Budgetary uncertainty hindering the execution of National Academies Decadal Survey priorities and long-term mission planning
* Risk of ceding international leadership and technical norm-setting in space exploration due to inconsistent investment
fields.rationale: Draws on advocacy talking points regarding China competition, workforce instability (4,000 civil servants), and decadal survey priorities.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe the project or program, what it will do and why it is necessary.
fields.draft_value:
* $9 billion programmatic request to fund the full portfolio of NASA's Science Mission Directorate
* Execution of peer-reviewed missions in planetary science, astrophysics, heliophysics, and Earth science
* Maintenance of critical national infrastructure for weather forecasting, planetary defense, and deep-space communications
* Support for high-priority discovery missions that advance Title 51 mandates for U.S. space leadership and scientific discovery
fields.rationale: Directly references the $9B ask and the core functions of SMD as outlined in the advocacy and reference values.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Please include all such partners with whom you will be working or from whom you have requested additional funding for your program or project.
fields.draft_value:
* American Astronomical Society (AAS)
* American Geophysical Union (AGU)
* Leading CA-20 aerospace contractors including Vertex Aerospace LLC and New Horizons Aeronautics, LLC
fields.rationale: Lists the allied organizations provided in the context along with key local contractors that partner with NASA in the district.

top_contracts.description: Facilities Operations and Maintenance Services (FOMS), janitorial Services, and grounds Maintenance.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Sustaining research facility operations, maintenance, and grounds upkeep.
